_note: Synthetic. Schema flattens EU consolidated, UK OFSI, and BIS Entity List into a single ingest shape so the matcher doesn't care which sanctions regime added the entry.

entries.name: Eurasian Precision Aerostructures
entries.summary: Listed on EU consolidated sanctions for serving as a procurement channel for sanctioned end users.

entries.name: Pacific Rim Avionics Trading
entries.summary: UK OFSI designation for evading sanctions on dual-use avionics components.

entries.name: Shenzhen Astro Components Ltd
entries.summary: BIS Entity List addition — export license required for all EAR-controlled items.
